things.name: Iraqi Museum
things.description: One of the world's greatest archaeology museums with Sumerian, Babylonian and Assyrian treasures

things.name: Al-Mutanabbi Street
things.description: Legendary book market street named after Iraq's greatest poet, rebuilt after car bombing

things.name: Al-Kadhimiya Shrine
things.description: One of Shia Islam's holiest shrines with stunning golden domes and minarets

things.name: Abbasid Palace
things.description: 12th-century Abbasid-era palace complex in the Rusafa district

things.name: Al-Mustansiriya University
things.description: 13th-century madrasa - one of the oldest universities in the world

things.name: Ctesiphon (Taq Kisra)
things.description: Ruins of the world's largest unsupported brick arch, capital of the Sasanian Empire

things.name: Babylon Ruins
things.description: Day trip to the ancient site of Nebuchadnezzar's Babylon with the Ishtar Gate reconstruction

things.name: Green Zone & Hands of Victory
things.description: Saddam Hussein's crossed swords monument built to celebrate the Iran-Iraq War victory

things.name: Al-Rashid Street
things.description: Baghdad's historic main street with Ottoman and Art Deco architecture

things.name: Abu Hanifa Mosque
things.description: Sunni Islam's most important mosque in Iraq, housing the tomb of Abu Hanifa
